<svg id="015-dnode" viewBox="0 0 820 300" role="img" aria-label="双链表结点" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">双链表结点</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line <svg id="015-insert" viewBox="0 0 820 300" role="img" aria-label="双链表后插" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">双链表后插</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="137" y1="130" x2="137" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="104" y="164" text-anchor="middle">头</text><text class="text tiny" x="156" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 175 157 H 215"/><rect class="box" x="220" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="287" y1="130" x2="287" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="254" y="164" text-anchor="middle">A</text><text class="text tiny" x="306" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 325 157 H 365"/><rect class="box" x="370" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="437" y1="130" x2="437" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="404" y="164" text-anchor="middle">B</text><text class="text tiny" x="456" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 475 157 H 515"/><rect class="box" x="520" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="587" y1="130" x2="587" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="554" y="164" text-anchor="middle">C</text><text class="text tiny" x="606" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><text class="text small" x="643" y="164">NULL</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="214" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="219">虚线箭头带动画，表示指针方向和遍历过程</text></svg>

<svg id="015-delete" viewBox="0 0 820 300" role="img" aria-label="双链表删除" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">双链表删除</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="137" y1="130" x2="137" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="104" y="164" text-anchor="middle">头</text><text class="text tiny" x="156" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 175 157 H 215"/><rect class="box" x="220" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="287" y1="130" x2="287" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="254" y="164" text-anchor="middle">A</text><text class="text tiny" x="306" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 325 157 H 365"/><rect class="box" x="370" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="437" y1="130" x2="437" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="404" y="164" text-anchor="middle">B</text><text class="text tiny" x="456" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 475 157 H 515"/><rect class="box" x="520" y="130" width="105" height="54" rx="8"/><line x1="587" y1="130" x2="587" y2="184" stroke="#cbd5e1"/><text class="text" x="554" y="164" text-anchor="middle">C</text><text class="text tiny" x="606" y="163" text-anchor="middle">next</text><text class="text small" x="643" y="164">NULL</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="214" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="219">虚线箭头带动画，表示指针方向和遍历过程</text></svg>

<svg id="015-traverse" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="双向遍历" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">双向遍历</text><rect class="box pulse" x="30" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="105" y="143" text-anchor="middle">当前结点</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 188 137 H 205"/><rect class="box" x="213" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="288" y="143" text-anchor="middle">next 向后</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 371 137 H 388"/><rect class="box" x="396" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="471" y="143" text-anchor="middle">处理数据</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 554 137 H 571"/><rect class="box" x="579" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="654" y="143" text-anchor="middle">prior 向前</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="205" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="210">动画高亮表示处理步骤正在推进</text></svg>
